description: Internal route planning and optimization system for recycling collection trucks, featuring LINE LIFF integration for drivers.

tech_stack.frontend_driver: LINE LIFF (LINE Front-end Framework) / React SPA with TailwindCSS
tech_stack.backend: Next.js Route Handlers (Node.js API) & LINE Messaging API SDK
tech_stack.optimization_engine: Google OR-Tools / JS-based heuristic for CVRP

columns.line_user_id: String (Unique, Nullable for Driver login integration)
columns.name: String

features.name: Dispatcher Dashboard & Batch Import
features.description: ระบบหลังบ้านสำหรับผู้จัดคิวรถในการนำเข้าพิกัดและติดตามการทำงานผ่านแดชบอร์ดแผนที่
tasks: Create CSV/Excel parsing route for daily locations import
Build Leaflet-based map view showcasing active vehicles and collection points
Design route management list to manually re-assign or adjust point order

features.name: Route Optimization Engine
features.description: ส่วนคำนวณและประมวลผลจัดเส้นทางอัจฉริยะ (CVRP) บนฐาน OSRM
tasks: Integrate OSRM API / Docker container for distance/time matrix calculation
Implement Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) clustering & routing algorithm
Develop background job to run optimization and generate daily routes automatically

features.name: Driver App via LINE LIFF
features.description: แอปพลิเคชันฝั่งคนขับรถ ทำงานบนหน้าต่าง LINE Chat ผ่านเทคโนโลยี LIFF
tasks: Setup LINE Developers Console, create LIFF App and link with the frontend URL
Implement LINE Login Integration to auto-authenticate drivers using line_user_id
Build mobile-first task list inside LIFF with buttons for External Navigation (Google Maps) and job reporting
Configure LocalStorage caching and offline synchronization queue for report submission during internet drops
